transcript.message: Interview session connected. Microphone is ready.
Microphone enabled. You can start speaking.
Interview started. Please introduce yourself and share what drew you to caregiving work.
Hi there, I'm CareBot. This interview takes about 12 minutes. Short examples help. Please avoid private patient details. Ready to start?
Great! Let's begin. Question one: Have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients did you work with and what services did you perform?
I mean, not officially, but I have a health family here and there. I'm a quick learner, so I can figure it out on the spot.
Got it. Helping family shows initiative. Next question: Imagine you're finding a caregiver for a loved one. What traits or skills would be most important to you?
Someone who gets things done fast and doesn't make a big deal out of stuff
Efficiency and calm under pressure are valuable. Last question: How has your prior work or life experience helped you build the skills to be a good caregiver?
I mean, I've not done caregiving per se, but I mean, give me a checklist and I'll tick it off.
Understood. Following a checklist effectively is a useful skill. Thanks for sharing. We'll review and update you soon. Please leave the meeting by clicking the button below.
